commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] No narrow automated repair remains; the maintainer-labeled PR needs human merge-order review against overlapping Discord progress changes and final checks.; Cleared: The diff only changes Discord TypeScript runtime/tests and does not touch dependencies, workflows, credentials, package scripts, or other supply-chain surfaces. (sha=483db36b920e1634f518e3fc793b9d66c220db6c)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes Discord progress-mode reasoning handling to merge raw reasoning text before display formatting, narrows legacy display-prefix detection, compacts long italic progress lines safely, and adds Discord process regressions.

PR surface: Source +44, Tests +254. Total +298 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible rather than locally executed: the current Discord progress callback path and the PR tests show how delta-style reasoning callbacks can be merged into one visible line. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow automated repair remains; the maintainer-labeled PR needs human merge-order review against overlapping Discord progress changes and final checks.

target.title: fix(discord): accumulate reasoning progress deltas
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #83983.

Discord progress-mode reasoning updates were formatting each reasoning callback with the display `Thinking...` wrapper before draft-preview merge logic saw it. Since the merge logic treats display-prefixed reasoning text as a full snapshot, Codex app-server delta chunks like `"Considering"`, `" plugin"`, `" installation"`, `"!"` could replace each other until only the final tiny chunk remained visible.

This keeps reasoning stream payloads raw until `pushReasoningProgress()` merges delta/snapshot semantics, then applies the existing reasoning display formatter once for the stable progress line. The follow-up narrows legacy display-prefix detection to actual formatted display blocks, so raw reasoning text that starts with `Thinking`, `Thinking:`, `Thinking...`, a single `Thinking` line, or `Reasoning:` is preserved. Long reasoning progress lines are compacted before italic wrapping so Discord markdown remains balanced after truncation.

No config surface or plugin surface changes.

## Proof

```sh
OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts --reporter=dot
# Test Files 1 passed (1)
# Tests 95 passed (95)

./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.draft-preview.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts
# All matched files use the correct format.

./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.draft-preview.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts
# Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.

git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
# passed

git diff --check
# passed

/home/giodl/.local/toolchains/node-v22.22.3-linux-x64/bin/codex review --base origin/main
# No actionable regressions found in the Discord progress-draft path.
```

Rebased onto current `main` (`e1a98171417c6d1a143b3c1765795e4420eb4c19`). Signed head: `483db36b920e1634f518e3fc793b9d66c220db6c`.
